name: Carmel Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heat-safe roaster or deep baking dish, combine the popped popcorn.
2. Add 2 cups of brown sugar, 2 sticks of butter melted, and 1/2 cup of dark corn syrup to the popcorn in the roaster.
3. Place the roaster over medium-high heat and bring the mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Continue boiling until it reaches a full rolling boil, which should take about 5 minutes once at a rapid boil.
5. Remove from heat and stir in 1 teaspoon of butter and 1/2 teaspoon of baking soda.
6. Pour the caramel sauce over the popcorn, ensuring it is evenly coated.
7. Transfer to a greased baking sheet or roaster pan and bake at 225°F for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes to ensure even coating.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
